title: modskie
description:
I use this modpack for my SMP Server and Singleplayer Hardcore Survival. Use this modpack and you will be a pro in Hardcore Survival! (real)

Enjoy! :D
body:
![Modskie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6231af92311235d2ccd4e8899a93f6947b34b9b5.png)                                                                                                                                     I use this modpack for my Minecraft Singleplayer Hardcore Survival, it made my life in Minecraft a little easier. There are some really nice mods that made you Minecraft experience so much more fun :).                                                                                                                                                              **HOW TO INSTALL:**
Download the Modrinth app
Search for MODSKIE and click install
Run the instance, check your settings/keybinds and enjoy! :D.                                                                                                 If you have any questions: [Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/tFDCjnn)
